summary_en: Corrected public notice. Culture Convenience Club proceeding with public acquisition of all common shares and warrants of Jimoty (7082). CEO Kato Takahiro holds 992,000 shares (10.08% S/O) + 136 warrants (27,200 shares, 0.28% S/O); pledged 710,000 shares to Daiwa Securities now released as of 26 May 2026. Kato committed to tender all unpledged shares plus warrants; pledged portion to follow upon lien release before offer close.
title_en: Notice regarding correction of "Announcement of Commencement of Public Tender Offer for Shares and Other Securities of Jimoty Inc. (Securities Code: 7082) by Culture Convenience Club Inc." and Public Tender Offer Commencement Notice, in connection with submission of corrected tender offer report
translation_en_brief: This is a corrected notice issued by Culture Convenience Club (CCC) regarding its public tender offer for all common shares and warrants of Jimoty Inc., filed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market (code 7082). The correction addresses changes in pledging status of CEO Kato Takahiro's shareholdings. As of the original 15 May 2026 announcement, Kato held 992,000 common shares (10.08% of S/O) plus 136 warrants representing 27,200 shares (0.28% of S/O). Of his shareholding, 710,000 shares were pledged to Daiwa Securities to secure a loan. By 26 May 2026, Daiwa released the pledge in full. Under the tendering agreement with CCC, Kato committed to tender all his shares and warrants; the previously pledged 710,000 shares will be tendered following the release of the pledge, no later than the close of the tender offer period. This correction clarifies the mechanics of Kato's participation in the offer and does not alter the fundamental terms of the acquisition.
